description: Fuzzy carry-forward contract for ECM/DCM (full behavior lives in the agent's skill). On a fuzzy-only match: USE it immediately, answer the question, state the substitution ('I used <resolved name> [<ID>]'), and keep the resolved id across turns. ANTI-PATTERN (never do): entity_search -> fuzzy suggestion -> stop without answering -> repeat next turn. Follow the entity_search response's next_action to call fuzzy_resolve when suggested. Explicit labeled ids (DEAL_ID/GPNUM/GFCID) are NEVER fuzzy-substituted — zero rows means 'No data found for <ID>'.
rejection_signals: try a different deal / try again
I meant <different name> / search for <X> instead
on_rejection: Clear the fuzzy slot and run a fresh entity_search with the new name.
implicit_acceptance_signals: another question about the same entity without rejection
pronouns: it / this deal / that deal / this investor / they / them
the original (misspelled) name repeated in a follow-up
on_acceptance: Reuse the resolved id directly in SQL. Do NOT call entity_search again for the same entity.
